summary: Refactoring verification complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Stock Summary shows Opening column with correct values, Settings page shows Opening Stock with 9 items and Carry Forward button, Header shows KMS+FY selectors. The stock_calculator.py and payment_service.py refactoring did NOT change any behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: REFACTORING VERIFIED: stock_calculator.py contains pure calculation functions (calc_cmr_paddy_in, calc_pvt_paddy_in, calc_paddy_used, calc_rice_produced, etc.)
REFACTORING VERIFIED: payment_service.py contains DB operations (create_cash_and_ledger, delete_linked_cash_entries, update_entry_paid_amount)
GET /api/stock-summary correctly uses stock_calculator functions and returns 'opening' field for all items
GET /api/paddy-stock correctly uses stock_calculator functions for paddy calculations
POST /api/private-payments correctly uses payment_service for creating cashbook+ledger entries
DELETE /api/private-payments/{id} correctly uses payment_service for reversing payments
Available = Opening + In - Out formula verified for all stock items
Opening stock values from iteration 110 preserved: Paddy=500, Rice(Usna)=300
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing opening stock from iteration 110
context_for_next_testing_agent: Internal refactoring complete. stock_calculator.py and payment_service.py are now centralized utility modules. All existing functionality works exactly the same. Opening stock for KMS 2024-2025: Paddy=500, Rice(Usna)=300 (set in iteration 110).

stock_calculator_refactoring.details: All stock calculation functions work correctly: calc_cmr_paddy_in, calc_pvt_paddy_in, calc_paddy_used, calc_rice_produced, calc_govt_delivered, calc_pvt_rice_sold, calc_byproduct_produced, calc_byproduct_sold, calc_frk_in

payment_service_refactoring.details: Payment creation/deletion/reversal works correctly via payment_service.py functions

stock_summary_opening_balance.details: Opening column visible with amber values, Available = Opening + In - Out verified

paddy_stock_endpoint.details: Returns cmr_paddy_in, pvt_paddy_in, pv_paddy_in, total_paddy_used, available_paddy

fy_settings.details: GET /api/fy-settings returns both active_fy and financial_year

frontend_verification.branding_section: PASS - Extra Fields with GSTIN and Mobile

changed_files: /app/backend/routes/purchase_vouchers.py - Uses stock_calculator for paddy-stock and stock-summary
refactoring_summary.behavior_change: NONE - All APIs return same data as before refactoring
